title: Weekly Marketing Planning & Goals
summary: Ziad presented advertising content, and Michael raised concerns about factual accuracy, emphasizing the need for system checks on quantitative metrics. They discussed content strategy, agreeing on a character limit for Facebook content and addressing technical issues. Michael requested past creative posts in PDF format and examined an AI-generated output, questioning its data connections.

decisions.description: Content requirements should include "fact check quantitative metrics and statistics" and "Punchy lines".
Content length for Facebook should optionally include a limit of 250 characters.
Remove the example output to reduce the file size.
Past creative posts to be provided in PDF format.

actionItems.task: Select and import the previous creative posts and send them to Michael Donovan in a PDF format.

expectedOutcome.description: Michael Donovan receives a PDF containing the past creative posts.

tensions: Questioning the factual accuracy of the "9 hours to 5 minutes" statistic.
Concerns about AI's data connections and relevance of certain outputs.
Image produced by AI was not the right orientation.
